name: January 20 episode - Honoring the Fathers of Faith
desc: Segment: 'The fathers who shaped us' - call for listener stories, open the phone lines. Considering Psalm 68:5 or Proverbs 22:6 - confirm by Thursday prep session. Need two musical drops from Chris Tomlin library.

name: Guest booking - Rev. Angela Dawson (New Year episode pre-record)
desc: Confirm Rev. Angela Dawson for the pre-recorded New Year gathering episode. Topic: 'Freedom and faith - what does liberation mean in our community?' Send calendar invite and talking points by January 22.

name: Sponsor invoice - Covenant Insurance Group (January)
desc: Send January invoice to Covenant Insurance Group for on-air mentions. 4 spots per episode x 4 Saturdays. Confirm rate with TJ before sending.

name: Script - January 24 episode (grief & resilience)
desc: Theme: 'When the ground shifts - finding footing after loss.' Include segment on community grief resources at Bluff City Medical Center (general, no patient info). Playlist: Lauren Daigle, Keith & Kristyn Getty.

name: Radio 7th anniversary episode concept (Oct 2026)
desc: Show launched Oct 2019 - plan a special retrospective episode. Listener call-ins, highlight pastor/community voices, possibly feature Pastor Greer. Draft outline this fall.
due: Radio show Sun 6 AM — Grace on Grace episode.

name: Sponsor renewal - Mitchell's Flowers (Q1)
desc: Mitchell's Flowers sponsorship renews February 1. Reach out to confirm Q1 rate. TJ has the contact - coordinate before January 28.

name: Social media graphics - January episodes (Canva)
desc: Create show graphics for January 20 and January 24 episodes. Use @morningreflectionsrebecca brand colors. Post Friday evening before each Saturday broadcast.

name: January 11 episode - 'Navigating grief' (AIRED)
desc: Aired January 11. Segment covered community resources for bereavement. Listener feedback positive. Archive audio on show drive.

name: January 16 episode - 'Caregiver Sunday' (AIRED)
desc: Aired January 16. Featured Bluff City Community College nursing perspective via Sandra Coles. Strong listener response. Archived.

name: Bluff City Auto Care - spot copy refresh
desc: Current 30-second spot sounds dated. Rewrite copy with fresh messaging for the new year. Send draft to TJ for approval before January 31 air date.

name: CPE continuing education - log hours (deadline Dec 31)
desc: 28 of 50 required hours completed. 22 hours remaining. Upcoming CE opportunities: APC regional webinar Oct 15, Memphis chaplaincy symposium Nov 20. Log all sessions in the APC portal.

name: Community church health fair - planning (Deacon Mosley)
desc: Annual health fair coordination with Deacon Charles Mosley. Secure volunteer signup, confirm health screening stations, book speaker for wellness talk. Target date: Saturday, October 3, 2026.

name: CPE resident mid-year evaluations
desc: Conduct mid-year reviews for both CPE residents. Prepare written feedback forms, schedule 30-min sessions with each. Deadline: end of January per Dr. Vickers.

name: Grace Community fall festival - emcee prep (Oct 31)
desc: Emcee trunk-or-treat and fall festival at Grace Community Church. Coordinate with Pastor Greer on run-of-show, confirm sound system, prep welcome script. Fun, family-focused event.

name: Pastoral care team retreat - agenda draft
desc: Plan half-day retreat for 4 staff chaplains + 2 CPE residents. Focus on compassion fatigue and restorative practices. Confirm date with Dr. Vickers. Budget under $200 total (light refreshments + printed materials).

name: Advent dawn meditation - delivered (DONE)
desc: Delivered Advent dawn meditation at Grace Community Church. Reflection: 'Light breaks into the darkness.' Well received. Archive script for future reference.

name: Porch garden - plan beds and start cool-season greens
desc: Buy starts from Kroger garden center or Memphis Farmers Market. Plant kale and collards in raised bed by back fence. Also replenish bird feeders and tidy up the porch swing area.

name: Thanksgiving 2026 - host planning
desc: Host Thanksgiving at the Cooper-Young house Nov 26. Naomi and Marcus confirmed. Invite Dorothy, Brenda (travel from Jackson MS). Menu: pot roast, mac & cheese, cornbread, sweet potato cobbler. Order flowers from Mitchell's.

name: Bungalow - HVAC seasonal tune-up
desc: Schedule HVAC service to keep the system running through the cold months. Last service was October 2025. Call Mid-South Heating & Cooling for appointment.

name: Marcus birthday gift planning (Aug 19)
desc: Marcus turns 22 on Aug 19. He mentioned wanting a quality microphone for his sports broadcasting coursework at Crescent City University. Check Amazon and B&H Photo. Budget ~$120.
